programme.desc: Raed Athamneh, father, fixer and six-time war survivor, always bounces back. But after Israel's 2014 war on Gaza, can Raed recover once more?

programme.desc: The Lebanese Civil War forces around 30,000 Muslims and Christians to flee their homeland and join an exodus to Australia to start new lives (14)
